message:
fix(mobile): touch targets, scroll containers, dvh units, wrap fixes (#6546)

Wave 9 mobile-UX cleanup from @mrhapile reports.

- Navbar 3-dots: add 44x44 min touch target (#6519)
- Banner inline buttons: bump py-0.5 to py-2 for tap target (#6520)
- Mission sidebar close: 44x44 min touch (#6521)
- Mission chat send: min-h-44 py-3 (#6522)
- Mission chat terminate inline: min-h-44 (#6523)
- FlightPlan SVG container: explicit max-w-full overflow-x-auto (#6524)
- AssignmentMatrix: wrap in max-w-full overflow-x-auto (#6525)
- Mission chat header: flex-wrap so icons reflow (#6527)
- Navbar overflow menu + theme toggle: shrink-0 (#6528)
- Mobile dropdown AI label: truncate min-w-0 (#6529)
- Sidebar snoozed wrapper: min-w-0 (#6532)
- Sidebar inline rename input: w-[150px] md:w-full (#6533)
- MissionDetailView code/yaml pre: max-w-[85vw] (#6534)
- MissionSidebar bottom sheet: max-h-[80dvh] (#6535)
- Layout main pb: pb-[calc(6rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] (#6536)
- Navbar hamburger menu: max-h-[60dvh] (#6537)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

Individual scrollable children // (tables, code blocks) still scroll horizontally inside wrappers. - className="relative flex-1 p-4 pb-24 md:p-6 md:pb-28 transition-[margin] duration-300 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden scroll-enhanced min-w-0" + className="relative flex-1 p-4 pb-[calc(6rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] md:p-6 md:pb-[calc(7rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] transition-[margin] duration-300 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden scroll-enhanced min-w-0" > }>
